node.title: Sonet Insulated Casserole, Set of 3, 500ml+1000ml+1500ml
node.description: Sonet Insulated Casserole, Set of 3, 500ml+1000ml+1500ml Elegant & Functional: The Sonet Insulated Casserole Set of 3 blends elegance and functionality in classic Black, Beige, and White colors. Versatile Sizes: Includes three insulated casseroles with capacities of 500ml, 1000ml, and 1500ml, suitable for various culinary needs. Durable Construction: Crafted with a durable outer layer of virgin plastic and an inner layer of stainless steel for excellent temperature retention and robustness. Keeps Food at Desired Temperature: Ideal for keeping dishes both warm and cold, ensuring your meals are served at their perfect temperature. Stylish & Practical: A stylish and practical addition to your kitchen that enhances your dining experience.

node.title: Aurum Insulated Casserole, 1500ml
node.description: Aurum Insulated Casserole, 1500mlElegant & Practical Design: Perfect for family meals, picnics, potlucks, and special occasions.Keeps Food Hot for Hours: Innovative double-wall insulation ensures every meal stays warm and flavorful.Premium Build Quality: Made from 100% food-grade stainless steel for safety, hygiene, and odor-free dining.Convenient & Ergonomic: Easy-grip handle and firm-fitting lid for secure transportation and moisture retention.Available in 5 Stylish Colors: Choose from White, Black, Grey, Beige, and Brown to suit your style.Upgrade Your Kitchen: A versatile casserole that adds sophistication and convenience to your dining experience.
node.descriptionHtml:
Aurum Insulated Casserole, 1500ml

Elegant & Practical Design: Perfect for family meals, picnics, potlucks, and special occasions.
Keeps Food Hot for Hours: Innovative double-wall insulation ensures every meal stays warm and flavorful.
Premium Build Quality: Made from 100% food-grade stainless steel for safety, hygiene, and odor-free dining.
Convenient & Ergonomic: Easy-grip handle and firm-fitting lid for secure transportation and moisture retention.
Available in 5 Stylish Colors: Choose from White, Black, Grey, Beige, and Brown to suit your style.
Upgrade Your Kitchen: A versatile casserole that adds sophistication and convenience to your dining experience.

node.descriptionHtml:
Aurum Insulated Casserole, Set of 3

Elegant & Practical Design: Perfect for family meals, picnics, potlucks, and special occasions.
Keeps Food Hot for Hours: Innovative double-wall insulation ensures every meal stays warm and flavorful.
Premium Build Quality: Made from 100% food-grade stainless steel for safety, hygiene, and odor-free dining.
Convenient & Ergonomic: Easy-grip handle and firm-fitting lid for secure transportation and moisture retention.
Available in 5 Stylish Colors: Choose from White, Black, Grey, Beige, and Brown to suit your style.
Upgrade Your Kitchen: A versatile casserole that adds sophistication and convenience to your dining experience.

node.title: Midas Insulated Casserole Set of 3, 500ml+1000ml+1500ml
node.description: Midas Insulated Casserole Set of 3 Versatile Sizes: Includes casseroles of 500ml, 1000ml, and 1500ml capacities. Superior Insulation: Stainless steel interior retains temperature for hot or cold dishes. Classic Colors: Available in Black, Brown, and White. Durable Build: Strong plastic exterior for everyday use. Practical Essential: Perfect for serving and storing meals.
node.descriptionHtml:
Midas Insulated Casserole Set of 3

  • Versatile Sizes: Includes casseroles of 500ml, 1000ml, and 1500ml capacities.
  • Superior Insulation: Stainless steel interior retains temperature for hot or cold dishes.
  • Classic Colors: Available in Black, Brown, and White.
  • Durable Build: Strong plastic exterior for everyday use.
  • Practical Essential: Perfect for serving and storing meals.
